title: Sports Authority of India Dean Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: The Sports Authority of India (SAI) has officially announced the Dean Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published at Sports Authority of India Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 64 years and hold a Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science along with required service experience can now submit their online applications up to 05 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

basic_details.job_title: Sports Authority of India Dean Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Sports Authority of India (SAI) has officially announced the Dean Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published at Sports Authority of India Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 64 years and hold a Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science along with required service experience can now submit their online applications up to 05 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science from a recognized University or Institution, 5 years regular service in Pay Level-12 or analogous post in scientific cadre
qualification.details: Dean: Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science from a recognized University or Institution. Officers who have worked under the Central Government/ State Government/ Union Territory Administrations in the scientific cadre holding Analogous post in the parent cadre/department or regular service of 5 years in the Pay Level-12 Rs.78800-209200 (PB-3, Rs.15600-39100+Rs.7600/- Grade Pay).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Sports Authority of India to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sports Authority of India Dean recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of online applications is 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Dean post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Dean position in the Sports Authority of India recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Dean post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. Degree in the relevant field of Sports Science from a recognized University or Institution, along with 5 years of regular service in Pay Level-12 or an analogous post in the scientific cadre.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Dean position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Dean post is 64 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Dean post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be placed at Level-13, with a salary ranging from Rs. 123100 to Rs. 215900 (PB-4, Rs.37400-67000+Rs. 8700/- Grade Pay).

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Dean recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Dean post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which mode can candidates apply for this job?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for the Sports Authority of India Dean recruitment through the online mode only.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of the Sports Authority of India?
faq.answer: The official website of the Sports Authority of India is https://sportsauthorityofindia.nic.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to apply.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is F.No. 01-04001(02)/35/2024-HO - Personnel Division / 301.
